**Phase 3 — Shopping Cart features (required).**

The shopping cart is not functional right now. It needs fixing. This feature is required for
a user to know what is in their cart and be able to checkout.

### Tasks
- [ ] make the shopping cart work
- [ ] Find and fix the cause so **every** the cart updates without error
- [ ] Add a unit test that proves the fix

### Done when
- Editing any field (including stock) persists correctly
